survey_name: VITAL Health — Copay Assistance Patient Survey
description: Understanding patient experiences with specialty medication costs and copay assistance program awareness. Use this file as a reference when building the survey in the Pollfish dashboard at pollfish.com.
target_audience: US adults 18+ currently taking or recently prescribed specialty medications

questions.text: Thank you for participating in this brief survey about specialty medication costs. Your responses will help us improve access to copay assistance programs. All answers are anonymous.
questions.notes: Use Pollfish 'Description' question type — no response required.

questions.text: Are you currently taking or have you been prescribed a specialty medication in the past 12 months?
answers: Yes, I am currently taking a specialty medication
Yes, I was prescribed one in the past 12 months but am no longer taking it
No, but a family member is

questions.text: What type of condition does your specialty medication treat?
answers: Autoimmune / Rheumatology (e.g., rheumatoid arthritis, psoriasis, Crohn's disease)

questions.text: What type of health insurance do you currently have?
How much do you currently pay out-of-pocket per month for your specialty medication?
answers: I don't know / I haven't filled it yet

questions.text: Have you ever skipped doses, delayed filling a prescription, or stopped taking a specialty medication because of cost?
Before this survey, were you aware that copay assistance programs exist for specialty medications?
answers: Yes, I've heard of them but don't use one
No, this is the first I'm hearing about it
I'm not sure what that means

questions.text: What has prevented you from using a copay assistance program? (Select all that apply)
answers: I didn't think I would qualify
The application process seemed too complicated
My doctor or pharmacy never mentioned it
I couldn't find the right program for my medication
I applied but was denied or waitlisted

questions.text: How helpful would it be to have a specialist handle the entire copay assistance enrollment process for you?
If a free service could reduce your monthly medication cost by 80% or more, how likely would you be to use it?
How would you prefer to get help with copay assistance enrollment? (Select all that apply)
answers: Speak with a specialist on the phone
Use an online tool to find programs myself
Have my doctor's office handle it

questions.text: How important is it that a copay assistance service does NOT require you to share your full medical history?
Rank the following factors by importance when choosing a copay assistance service (most important first):
answers: Having a real person to talk to

pollfish_setup_instructions.step_1: Log in to your Pollfish account at pollfish.com
pollfish_setup_instructions.step_2: Click 'Create Survey' and name it 'VITAL Health — Copay Assistance Patient Survey'
pollfish_setup_instructions.step_3: Add each question using the question types specified in this file (single_choice, multiple_choice, ranking, description)
pollfish_setup_instructions.step_4: Configure skip logic on question 2: if respondent selects 'No', skip to question 14
pollfish_setup_instructions.step_5: Set targeting: US adults 18+, optionally filter by health condition interest
pollfish_setup_instructions.step_6: For WebPlugin integration: copy your API key from Dashboard > Apps and paste it into your .env.local as NEXT_PUBLIC_POLLFISH_API_KEY
pollfish_setup_instructions.step_7: Set debug: true during development, then switch to false for production
